author: missirol
body:
#### PR description:

As agreed with L1-Scouting experts, this PR implements some changes to the data format `l1ScoutingRun3::FastJet` introduced in #48093.
 - The float data member `et_` is replaced by a float data member `pt_`, so that the jet p4 is stored as $(p_{T}, \eta, \phi, M)$ (using $p_{T}$ rather than $E_{T}$), in line with the convention followed in ROOT and many other data formats in CMSSW (e.g. the HLT-scouting ones). This was mentioned in [#48093 (comment)](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/48093#discussion_r2687452266), but at the time I did not realise that [the `fastjet::PseudoJet` class does have a `pt()` method](https://github.com/cms-externals/fastjet/blob/cms/v3.4.1/include/fastjet/PseudoJet.hh#L154).
 - The float data member `area_` is replaced by a float data member `energyCorr_`. Currently, there is only one plugin producing this kind of jets, and it does not attempt any area computation, so the jet-area value would always have a dummy value (-1). Saving the jet-energy-scale correction is arguably more useful. The possibility to apply JECs to these jets is expected to be introduced in a follow-up PR in the near future.
 - The data-format class is renamed from `l1ScoutingRun3::FastJet` to `l1ScoutingRun3::CaloJet` (to be a bit more descriptive of its purpose). In practice, this creates a new data format, removing the `FastJet` one (more on this in [#50304 (comment)](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50304#discussion_r2885028715)).

Two plugins are renamed accordingly (they are not used in any central workflows yet, so this renaming has no knock-on effects).
 - `MaskOrbitBxScoutingFastJet` is renamed to `MaskOrbitBxScoutingCaloJet`.
 - `ScoutingJetProducer` is renamed to `L1ScoutingCaloJetProducer`.

#### PR validation:

The unit test in `DataFormats/L1Scouting` passed.

#### If this PR is a backport, please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported, please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

`CMSSW_16_0_X`

To be backported for 2026 data-taking purposes (L1-Scouting).
title: L1S: replace data format `l1ScoutingRun3::FastJet` with `l1ScoutingRun3::CaloJet`
